name: safe-install
description: Route package installs through disposable OrbStack/Docker containers for local development and coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Isolated package installs for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Use safe-install to route npm, pnpm, uv, and pip install operations through disposable Docker-compatible containers with a project-only mount and disposable home directory.
defaultPrompt: Check whether package installs are protected.
Run a dry-run dependency install safely.
